posts.author: joe12south (Joseph Moore)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am a long time Zapier and Airtable user trying to accomplish similar integrations with Monday.com

I need to retrieve all of a Monday.com item’s fields when it changes. When I use the “Specific Column Value Changed in Board” trigger the returned payload is for an event, not the respective item’s data.

I do see that the item’s ID is in the event payload, but I don’t see any way to actually search for that item and retrieve it’s data.

Am I missing something or is this very basic functionality missing?
